step.title: Load test plan and architecture
step.action: Read the test plan and architecture documents to understand project scope and testing requirements.
If CI config exists, load it for pipeline context.

step.title: Select automation framework
step.action: Select automation framework(s) based on the technology stack and requirements.
Document rationale for each framework choice.

step.title: Define automation scope
step.action: Define what to automate versus what to keep manual.
Justify each decision based on ROI, stability, and frequency of execution.

step.title: Design test infrastructure
step.action: Design page objects, fixtures, helpers, and shared utilities.
Define folder structure and naming conventions for test code.

step.title: Plan maintenance strategy
step.action: Plan test data management, selector strategies, and flake management.
Define retry policies, quarantine rules, and ownership rotation.

steps.step: <template-output file="docs/testing-artifacts/test-automation-strategy-.md"> Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with automation strategy details.
